connectedAt.description: ISO timestamp the connection was first authorized.

errorPayload.description: Populated when `health == "error"`; raw payload string for the inspector.

expiresAt.description: Populated when `health == "expired"`; ISO of token expiry.

health.description: Operational state of a live connection. Drives the `ConnectionHealthBadge` colour, the row's right-side hint, and whether the action menu shows "Reauth" / "Retry" / "Resume".

lastEventAt.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent event observed.

lastTestStatus.description: Outcome of the last `Test connection` run.

lastTestedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last manual "Test connection" run. Older connections that pre-date the field render a `—` cell.

name.description: Workspace alias for the connection. Defaults to `source.name` at install time.

ownerEmail.description: Optional point-of-contact email for the install.

prevEventsLast24h.description: Previous-period (24h) event count, used to compute a trend delta on the card view ("+12% vs prev 24h").

scopes.description: Granted scope ids — joins with the per-vendor scope catalog.

source.description: Catalog source id (joins with the design-system `SOURCES` catalog). Free-form string so adding a new vendor doesn't require bumping a Rust enum.
